summary: Frontend testing of Template Manager app. All critical UI features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: SVG path in Settings icon has malformed 'd' attribute (console error: 'Expected number, 7.## 8 0Zm1.474...'). Minor visual glitch in the SVG path data for SettingsIcon in Sidebar.jsx line 65. Should be '7.898 8' not '7.## 8'.
tests_passed: App loads correctly at root URL
Create Template page loads with 4-step progress bar
Progress bar step 1 active - connector lines are bg-transparent (grey), not blue - bug fix confirmed working
API Token button opens/closes token textarea (toggle working)
Environment switcher opens and shows dev (standard), prod (standard), + ephemeral input
Navigation: All Configs, Create Config, Generate Summary, Settings all navigate correctly
Settings page loads with environment info and API endpoints
Category Config section is collapsible (collapses/expands correctly)
Reset button on Create Template page works
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation data-testids use format nav-{item.id} where IDs are: create-template, config-all, config-create, config-summary, settings. API token btn is api-token-btn, input is api-token-input, env switcher is env-switcher-btn.
